title: Limzly's Enhanced Vanilla
description:
Custom Minecraft experience for any server.
Vanilla minecraft isn't enough.
body:
**This is my own take on a Vanilla+ modpack, there are many performance foucused mods as well as some cosmetic changes, all to enhance the stanadard vanilla experiance.**

This is my own personal modpack that has a couple 'testers' and will be made based on what I do in minecraft, currently that is a mulitiplayer server.
Be aware that this bordering on the line of "cheats" so dont blame me for your mistakes.

If you encounter any issues feel free to contact me on my discord!

Minimum ram amount of 6gb and recommend of 8gb.

For the Lite version its 3-4gb

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5b227b2478719c13d6ce71ccdc4dc90d7bbc9c8e.png)

You are allowed to copy and edit this modpack for personal use.
